LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MOHAMMED R. AHMADI AND IRENE B. AHMADI'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION TO THE SUPERIOR COURT FOR THE COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE THAT VENUE IS IMPROPER. THE LOAN WAS FOR INVESTMENT PURPOSES IN DEVELOPING A PLOT OF LAND, NOT PRIMARILY FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY, OR HOUSEHOLD USE. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING IS GRANTED AS DEFENDANT INDICATED THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT OPPOSING THE REQUEST. COURT GAVE 21 DAYS LEAVE TO RESPOND. DEFENDANT INDICATED A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WILL BE SUBMITTED. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Motion For Order To Transfer Case To Los Angeles
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS MOHAMMED R. AHMADI AND IRENE B. AHMADI'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION TO THE SUPERIOR COURT FOR THE COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES.

APPEARANCES: Reza I. Gharakhani, Esq. of Rostow & Auster, LLP 310/772-0080 for defts & moving parties & specially appearing for pltf (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE THAT VENUE IS IMPROPER. THE LOAN WAS FOR INVESTMENT PURPOSES IN DEVELOPING A PLOT OF LAND, NOT PRIMARILY FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY, OR HOUSEHOLD USE. THE LAST ACT NECESSARY FOR THE CONTRACT TO BE FORMED OCCURRED IN SAN FRANCISCO. (CCP SECTION 395(a)) THE PLACE OF PERFORMANCE WAS SPECIALLY SET FORTH IN THE PROMISSORY NOTE AS SAN FRANCISCO AND THE MODIFICATION DID NOT AMEND THAT PROVISION. THE ARGUMENT TO TRANSFER BASED ON CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES IS PREMATURE. (SEE EASTON V. S.C. (1970) 12 CAL.APP.3D 243.
In addition, defendant's request for an extension of time to file a responsive pleading is granted as defendant indicated that plaintiff is not opposing the request. Court gave 21 days leave to respond. Defendant indicated a proposed form of order will be submitted. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Continued To Nov-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion For Order To Transfer Case To Los Angeles
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
